---
title: "Finance & Data Analytics Portfolio"
author: "Pratiksha Madnurkar"
date: "2026-05-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Finance & Data Analytics Portfolio

A collection of finance-focused R projects covering:

- FP&A Dashboarding
- DCF Valuation
- Econometric Forecasting
- Credit Risk Modeling
- Portfolio Optimization

## Projects

### 1. FP&A Dashboard
Interactive financial dashboard using Shiny and Plotly.

### 2. DCF Valuation Model
Discounted cash flow valuation with sensitivity analysis.

### 3. Econometrics Forecasting
ARIMA forecasting and GDP regression analysis using Eurostat data.

### 4. Credit Risk Model
Logistic regression credit default prediction using the German Credit dataset.

### 5. Portfolio Optimization
Efficient frontier simulation and mean-variance optimization.

## Tools Used

- R
- tidyverse
- ggplot2
- Shiny
- forecast
- quantmod
- PerformanceAnalytics
- quadprog
